description: Phase 12 — Personalized pitches for top 10 outreach targets

pitches.pitch_angle: Free, accurate mortgage affordability widget for your readers — uses standard DTI ratios, already built
pitches.subject_line: Free mortgage affordability widget for The Mortgage Reports
pitches.body:
Hi,

I read your mortgage guides on The Mortgage Reports — your coverage of rates, affordability, and homebuying strategies is exactly the kind of content where an interactive affordability calculator would fit naturally.

I built a free, embeddable mortgage affordability calculator widget that your readers can use directly on your articles. It uses standard 28%/36% DTI ratios, works on mobile, and requires no signup or data collection.

Embed code:
<iframe src="https://www.qfinhub.com/embed/mortgage-affordability" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;max-width:100%;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

Live preview: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Would this be useful for your readers? Happy to help with any questions.

Best,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB

pitches.pitch_angle: Your readers are literally buying homes — give them a free affordability calculator right on your guides
pitches.subject_line: Free interactive tool for your homebuying guides
pitches.body:
Hi,

I came across Home Buying Institute and was impressed by your comprehensive first-time homebuyer education. Your readers are actively figuring out their homebuying budget — and I built something that might help them do that right on your site.

It's a free mortgage affordability calculator widget that uses standard lending guidelines (28%/36% DTI). Readers can adjust their income, debts, and down payment and see their affordable home price instantly.

Embed:
<iframe src="https://www.qfinhub.com/embed/mortgage-affordability" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;max-width:100%;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

See it in action: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

100% free, no signup, no data collection. Just a clean, useful tool.

Would this be valuable for your readers?

Best,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB

pitches.pitch_angle: Free tool for your homebuyer education program — helps counselors and clients together
pitches.subject_line: Free tool for your homebuyer education program
pitches.body:
Hi,

Your work at NeighborWorks America providing homebuyer education and housing counseling is incredibly important. I wanted to share a free tool that might support your counselors and the families they serve.

It's a mortgage affordability calculator widget that lets users adjust income, debt, and down payment to see what they can afford — using standard 28%/36% DTI guidelines. It runs entirely in the browser, collects no data, and requires no signup.

Embed code:
<iframe src="https://www.qfinhub.com/embed/mortgage-affordability" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;max-width:100%;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

Live demo: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

I built this as a public resource — no cost, no catch. Would this be useful for your program?

Thank you for the work you do,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB

pitches.target_name: University of Illinois Extension — Financial Literacy
pitches.pitch_angle: Free educational tool for your financial literacy program — helps teach DTI ratios hands-on
pitches.subject_line: Free interactive DTI calculator for financial literacy education
pitches.body:
Hi,

I came across the financial literacy resources at University of Illinois Extension — Financial Literacy and wanted to share a free educational tool that might complement your curriculum.

It's a mortgage affordability calculator that teaches debt-to-income ratios hands-on — students can adjust income, debt, and down payment and see exactly how lenders calculate affordability using standard 28%/36% DTI guidelines.

Embed code:
<iframe src="https://www.qfinhub.com/embed/mortgage-affordability" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;max-width:100%;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

Live demo: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

100% free, no data collection, works on any device. Built as a public educational resource.

Would this be useful for your program?

Best,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB

pitches.pitch_angle: Free tool for your housing counselors — clients can use it during and after sessions
pitches.subject_line: Free tool for your housing counselors and their clients
pitches.body:
Hi,

I admire the work NFCC (National Foundation for Credit Counseling) does providing credit counseling and financial education. I wanted to share a free tool that might support your housing counselors.

It's a mortgage affordability calculator widget — clients can use it during counseling sessions and at home afterward. They adjust income, debts, down payment and instantly see their affordable home price using standard DTI ratios. No data collected, no signup, works on any device.

Embed:
<iframe src="https://www.qfinhub.com/embed/mortgage-affordability" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;max-width:100%;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

Preview: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Built as a public resource — completely free, no strings attached.

Would this be useful for your counselors?

Thank you,
Qasem Mohammed

pitches.pitch_angle: Fun, practical tool your readers can use right on your site — matches your voice
pitches.subject_line: Fun, free tool for your readers — mortgage affordability made simple
pitches.body:
Hi,

I love the voice and energy of Budgets Are Sexy — personal finance doesn't have to be boring. I built a free mortgage affordability calculator widget that's simple, clean, and actually kind of fun to use. Thought it might fit your style.

Readers punch in their income, debts, down payment — instant affordable home price. Uses standard DTI ratios. Mobile-friendly, no signup, no data collected.

Embed:
<iframe src="https://www.qfinhub.com/embed/mortgage-affordability" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;max-width:100%;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

Check it out: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Would this be a fun addition for your readers?

Cheers,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB
